creator: tz@freebsd.org
text:
@Jason:
Understood, thanks! :)

@Franco:
I noticed, that there was a new release just the day before you post the patch. The current version is 2.4.0, while your patch updates to 2.3.0.

Do you want to update your patch to the newest version or should i commit it like it is?

Greetings,
Torsten
